description: Create a facility record for Westside Cold Storage (800 Freezer Lane, Denver, CO 80204, Phone: (303) 555-0199) in CAMEO Data Manager. Log a historical incident linked to this facility for Anhydrous Ammonia (CAS 7664-41-7) occurring on 01/15/2025 at 08:30. The incident involved a release of 150 lbs to the air caused by equipment failure. Use the description "Forklift impact to external refrigeration pipe" and corrective action "Area evacuated; valve manually closed". Generate a report for this incident and save it as a PDF to C:\Users\Docker\Documents\Westside_Incident_Report.pdf.
